# Results

OrcaFlex calculates a wide range of results during simulation.

## Result Types

- Time history results
- Statistical results (min, max, mean)
- Spectral results

## Accessing Results

Results can be viewed in the OrcaFlex GUI or extracted via the OrcFxAPI.
